## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss operational processes, documentation, and team management strategies for fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to improve documentation of Marcel's preferences and operating system to enhance team efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Implement more structured processes for client management, meeting prep, and follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Transition client meeting ownership to Kyle and set up email/calendar delegations for leadership](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Initiate background checks for all full-time team members using Checker](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)

## Topics

### Documentation and Process Improvement

  - [Marcel emphasized the importance of documenting his preferences, operating system, and user guide](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Goal: Create tools and processes that make operations easier and more scalable](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Focus on documenting before/after meeting processes, SOPs, and triggers for various meeting types](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Wiets is working on a process flow for new clients with checklists to ensure all steps are completed](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)

### Communication Style and Preferences

  - [Marcel prefers a more informal, excited tone in communications](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Current drafts tend to be too formal; need to adjust writing style](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Plan to create prompts and custom GPTs to replicate Marcel's preferred communication style](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [Considering implementing Superhuman for email management and shared inboxes](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)

### Calendar Management and Time Allocation

  - [Tuesdays prioritized for in-person meetings and protected time](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
  - [Monday mornings reserved for deep work](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Transitioning more planning work to Kyle to free up Marcel's schedule](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [Goal: Create a cleaner slate for intentional time allocation](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Client and Contact Management

  - [Improve documentation of client interactions and personal details in Attio](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Create a "CRM for relationships" to track important personal information and connections](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Utilize this information for thoughtful gestures and proactive introductions](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)

### Team Structure and Support

  - [Transitioning client meeting ownership to Kyle](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Setting up email and calendar delegations for leadership team](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Expanding EA and program manager roles to support leaders](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)

### Background Checks

  - [Implement background checks for all full-time team members using Checker](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Process needed for both liability protection and client procurement requirements](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Wiets to coordinate with Molly to get necessary access and send out notifications to team](https://fathom.video/share/4xFGx9Dsg7kxYWL-m7GeSQ9m-n2Tg1jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1953.0)
